{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "sluggish-convert", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "French", "demographic_group": "Mixed", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: red-suite
logs.text: [it's definitely not him](http://imgur.com/EBTFYhc)

logs.name: sluggish-convert
logs.text:
I'm pretty sure that isn't Michael Moore.


Anyways, the point Friedman was making is that any large scale operation needs to quantify risks, benefits, and costs and make decisions on tradeoffs based on those amounts. The young man made an argument that sounded bad by comparing a small dollar value against a human life, obfuscating the low actual percentage likelihood of damage to that human life and thus overall calculation. Friedman used the large value in response because he wants to make explicit that a trade-off will exist and as the values change, what will be societally beneficial can become non-beneficial or vice versa. He believes the young man has not articulated a formal and consistent model to understand this continuum, as the young man left out a huge component of the calculation. He probably believed the pinto was satisfactorily safe and subject to a witch hunt (as it seems it was), so went after the first misunderstanding specific to the pinto instead of responding to the theoretical argument about whether it would be moral to knowingly sell an abnormally unsafe car.


You may find this Malcolm gladwell article about the engineering and risks behind the pinto interesting:

http://www.newyorker.com/magazine/2015/05/04/the-engineers-lament

logs.name: radioactive-easement
logs.text: "Are you guys even reading the article or just regurgitating what you think Friedman said? I mean, come on, 'he believes the pinto was satisfactorily safe'? That's not what he said at all. You're just parroting the OP's misinterpretation. And what's with the Malcolm Gladwell article? That's not relevant to the discussion. Can we please stick to the topic at hand?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion focused on the topic at hand. @red-suite, @sluggish-convert, please ensure your posts are relevant to the discussion. @radioactive-easement, your point is noted. Let's keep the conversation respectful and on topic. Thank you."

logs.name: concentric-brick
logs.text: "Are you guys even capable of having a coherent conversation? @sluggish-convert, your whole post was just a bunch of rambling nonsense about Friedman and the Pinto. And @radioactive-easement, your 'point' was just a bunch of snarky comments that didn't even address the topic. Can we please just stick to the discussion or are we just here to troll each other now?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's maintain a respectful tone and focus on the topic. @concentric-brick, please refrain from personal attacks. Everyone, let's keep the conversation constructive. Thank you."

logs.name: cruel-drum
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @concentric-brick, your post was right on point. @moderator, you're just enabling this guy's behavior. Can't you see he's not even trying to have a coherent conversation? And @sluggish-convert, I'm surprised you're defending him. You're just as bad as he is. This discussion is a joke."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion focused on the topic and avoid personal attacks. @cruel-drum, please refrain from making personal comments. Everyone, let's maintain a respectful tone. Thank you."

logs.name: radioactive-easement
logs.text: "wow, @cruel-drum, you're really good at throwing shade without actually saying anything meaningful. @moderator, can't you see @cruel-drum is just mad because his opinion got shut down? this conversation is literally just a bunch of adults having a tantrum"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation constructive and respectful. @radioactive-easement, please refrain from making personal comments. Everyone, let's focus on the topic at hand. Thank you."

logs.name: red-suite
logs.text: "@radioactive-easement, I'm surprised you think you can just dismiss @cruel-drum's opinion like that. I was right, and you're just mad because you can't handle the truth. This isn't a game, it's a discussion. Let's keep it civil, but @radioactive-easement, your tone is just as bad as @cruel-drum's. Get over yourself."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's maintain a respectful tone and focus on the topic. @red-suite, please refrain from personal attacks. Everyone, let's keep the conversation constructive. Thank you."

logs.name: concentric-brick
logs.text: "@red-suite, oh wow, you think you're so smart with your 'constructive' and 'civil' comments. Newsflash, honey, nobody likes a know-it-all like you. And btw, I was just trying to keep the conversation real, not sugarcoat everything. You're just mad because your precious 'opinion' got called out. So, go ahead and keep whining, see if I care."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation respectful and on topic. @concentric-brick, please refrain from personal attacks. Everyone, let's focus on the discussion at hand. Thank you."

logs.name: coal-prop
logs.text: "@concentric-brick, are you kidding me? You think you can just come in here and disrespect the moderator and then act all innocent when they call you out on it? Newsflash, buddy, you're the one who started this whole thing with your condescending tone. And by the way,'real' and 'constructive' aren't exactly synonymous, but I suppose that's too much for your limited vocabulary to handle. Just take a deep breath and try to keep up."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation respectful and on topic. @coal-prop, please refrain from personal attacks. Everyone, let's focus on the discussion at hand. Thank you."

logs.name: concentric-brick
logs.text: "Wow, @coal-prop, I'm so impressed by your mastery of the art of insults. I didn't know 'limited vocabulary' was a real thing, but I guess that's what happens when you're stuck in a bubble of your own ego. Newsflash, coal-prop: just because you're good at throwing shade doesn't mean you're good at having a real conversation. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand or are you going to keep wasting everyone's time with your 'constructive' comments?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation respectful and on topic. @concentric-brick, @coal-prop, please refrain from personal attacks and focus on the discussion. Further violations may result in disciplinary action. Thank you."

logs.name: sluggish-convert
logs.text: "Are you guys kidding me? Can't we just have a discussion without all the drama? @concentric-brick, your comment was way out of line. I was just trying to keep the conversation civil. @moderator, I think you're being too harsh. I'm not trying to be aggressive, I just want to have a respectful discussion. Can we please just move on from this?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's all take a step back and remember our goal here is to have a constructive discussion. @sluggish-convert, I appreciate your desire for civility. Let's all contribute positively to the conversation. Further comments that do not adhere to these guidelines will be moderated accordingly. Thank you."

logs.name: clean-rundown
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just enabling @sluggish-convert's behavior. His comment was completely out of line and you're just letting him off the hook. I was the one who made a comment and you're punishing me for it. This is ridiculous. @sluggish-convert, your comment was just as bad as mine, maybe worse. You're just trying to deflect attention from your own behavior."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's focus on the topic at hand and maintain a respectful tone. @clean-rundown, let's avoid personal attacks and keep the conversation constructive. @sluggish-convert, thank you for your input. Let's all contribute positively. Further warnings may lead to disciplinary action. Thank you."

logs.name: red-suite
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just enabling @sluggish-convert's behavior and now you're punishing me for calling out his out-of-line comment? I was the one who brought up the issue and you're just letting him off scot-free. This is ridiculous. @clean-rundown, your comment was completely reasonable and I'm the one who's being unfairly targeted. @moderator, can you please explain why you're not taking @clean-rundown's comment seriously?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation focused on the topic and maintain a respectful tone. @red-suite, I appreciate your concern. Let's avoid personal attacks and focus on the discussion. Further warnings may lead to disciplinary action. Thank you."

logs.name: coal-prop
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just enabling @sluggish-convert's behavior and now you're punishing me for calling out his out-of-line comment? I was the one who brought up the issue and you're just letting him off scot-free. This is ridiculous. @red-suite, your comment was completely reasonable and I'm the one who's being unfairly targeted. @moderator, can you please explain why you're not taking @clean-rundown's comment seriously? And by the way, @red-suite, your tone is just as bad as @sluggish-convert's. Maybe you should take a step back and calm down before making accusations."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation focused on the topic and maintain a respectful tone. Personal attacks and accusations will not be tolerated. Let's all remember the rules and contribute constructively. Further warnings may lead to disciplinary action. Thank you."

logs.name: clean-rundown
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just piling on and not addressing the real issue here. @coal-prop's comment was completely reasonable and I was just trying to clarify my point. You're not taking this seriously and it's getting ridiculous. @moderator, can you please explain why you're not listening to @coal-prop's concerns and instead are just attacking her? This is getting out of hand."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "I've reviewed the situation and have issued warnings to those involved. Let's focus on the topic and maintain a respectful dialogue. Further disruption will result in disciplinary action. Thank you for your cooperation. @coal-prop, @clean-rundown, @red-suite, @sluggish-convert."

logs.name: coal-prop
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just trying to silence me and @clean-rundown because we're not toeing the line. Newsflash: we're not here to coddle your fragile ego. If you can't handle a little debate, then maybe you shouldn't be moderating. And by the way, @clean-rundown's comment was completely reasonable, so stop trying to spin this as a personal attack."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Reminder to all users: Keep the discussion respectful and on topic. Further personal attacks will not be tolerated. @coal-prop, @clean-rundown, @red-suite, @sluggish-convert."

logs.name: clean-rundown
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just trying to stifle free speech and silence dissenting voices. Newsflash: we're not here to follow some arbitrary set of rules, we're here to have a discussion. And by the way, @coal-prop's comment was completely reasonable, so stop trying to spin this as a personal attack. And another thing, what's with the'reminder' post? Can't you just let us have a conversation without needing to remind us of the rules? It's like you're trying to be the'moderator police' or something. Get over yourself."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Reminder: Personal attacks and disrespect towards other users or moderators are not acceptable. Let's keep the conversation constructive and respectful. @clean-rundown, @coal-prop, please refrain from personal attacks and focus on the topic at hand. Further violations may result in disciplinary action."
